speaker: PERICLES
text: The god of this great vast, rebuke these surges,

speaker: PERICLES
text: Which wash both heaven and hell! And thou that hast

speaker: PERICLES
text: Upon the winds command, bind them in brass,

speaker: PERICLES
text: Having called them from the deep! O, still

speaker: PERICLES
text: Thy deaf’ning dreadful thunders, gently quench

speaker: PERICLES
text: Thy nimble sulfurous flashes.—O, how, Lychorida,

speaker: PERICLES
text: How does my queen?—Then, storm, venomously

speaker: PERICLES
text: Wilt thou spit all thyself? The seaman’s whistle

speaker: PERICLES
text: Is as a whisper in the ears of death,

speaker: PERICLES
text: Unheard.—Lychorida!—Lucina, O

speaker: PERICLES
text: Divinest patroness and midwife gentle

speaker: PERICLES
text: To those that cry by night, convey thy deity

speaker: PERICLES
text: Aboard our dancing boat, make swift the pangs

speaker: PERICLES
text: Of my queen’s travails!—Now, Lychorida!

speaker: LYCHORIDA
text: Here is a thing too young for such a place,

speaker: LYCHORIDA
text: Who, if it had conceit, would die, as I

speaker: LYCHORIDA
text: Am like to do. Take in your arms this piece

speaker: LYCHORIDA
text: Of your dead queen.

speaker: PERICLES
text: How? How, Lychorida?

speaker: LYCHORIDA
text: Patience, good sir. Do not assist the storm.

speaker: LYCHORIDA
text: Here’s all that is left living of your queen,

speaker: LYCHORIDA
text: A little daughter. For the sake of it,

speaker: LYCHORIDA
text: Be manly and take comfort.

speaker: PERICLES
text: O you gods!

speaker: PERICLES
text: Why do you make us love your goodly gifts

speaker: PERICLES
text: And snatch them straight away? We here below

speaker: PERICLES
text: Recall not what we give, and therein may

speaker: PERICLES
text: Use honor with you.

speaker: LYCHORIDA
text: Patience, good sir,

speaker: LYCHORIDA
text: Even for this charge.

speaker: PERICLES
text: Now mild may be thy life,

speaker: PERICLES
text: For a more blusterous birth had never babe.

speaker: PERICLES
text: Quiet and gentle thy conditions, for

speaker: PERICLES
text: Thou art the rudeliest welcome to this world

speaker: PERICLES
text: That ever was prince’s child. Happy what follows!

speaker: PERICLES
text: Thou hast as chiding a nativity

speaker: PERICLES
text: As fire, air, water, earth, and heaven can make

speaker: PERICLES
text: To herald thee from the womb.

speaker: PERICLES
text: Even at the first, thy loss is more than can

speaker: PERICLES
text: Thy portage quit, with all thou canst find here.

speaker: PERICLES
text: Now the good gods throw their best eyes upon ’t.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SAILOR
text: What courage, sir? God save you.

speaker: PERICLES
text: Courage enough. I do not fear the flaw.

speaker: PERICLES
text: It hath done to me the worst. Yet for the love

speaker: PERICLES
text: Of this poor infant, this fresh new seafarer,

speaker: PERICLES
text: I would it would be quiet.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SAILOR
text: Slack the bowlines there!—Thou wilt not,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SAILOR
text: wilt thou? Blow, and split thyself!

speaker:
SECOND
               
              SAILOR
text: But searoom, an the brine and cloudy

speaker:
SECOND
               
              SAILOR
text: billow kiss the moon, I care not.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SAILOR
text: Sir, your queen must overboard. The sea

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SAILOR
text: works high, the wind is loud, and will not lie till

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SAILOR
text: the ship be cleared of the dead.

speaker: PERICLES
text: That’s your superstition.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SAILOR
text: Pardon us, sir; with us at sea it hath been

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SAILOR
text: still observed, and we are strong in custom.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SAILOR
text: Therefore briefly yield ’er, for she must overboard

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SAILOR
text: straight.

speaker: PERICLES
text: As you think meet.—Most wretched queen!

speaker: LYCHORIDA
text: Here she lies, sir.

speaker: PERICLES
text: A terrible childbed hast thou had, my dear,

speaker: PERICLES
text: No light, no fire. Th’ unfriendly elements

speaker: PERICLES
text: Forgot thee utterly. Nor have I time

speaker: PERICLES
text: To give thee hallowed to thy grave, but straight

speaker: PERICLES
text: Must cast thee, scarcely coffined, in the ooze,

speaker: PERICLES
text: Where, for a monument upon thy bones

speaker: PERICLES
text: And e’er-remaining lamps, the belching whale

speaker: PERICLES
text: And humming water must o’erwhelm thy corpse,

speaker: PERICLES
text: Lying with simple shells.—O, Lychorida,

speaker: PERICLES
text: Bid Nestor bring me spices, ink, and paper,

speaker: PERICLES
text: My casket and my jewels; and bid Nicander

speaker: PERICLES
text: Bring me the satin coffin. Lay the babe

speaker: PERICLES
text: Upon the pillow. Hie thee, whiles I say

speaker: PERICLES
text: A priestly farewell to her. Suddenly, woman!

speaker:
SECOND
               
              SAILOR
text: Sir, we have a chest beneath the hatches,

speaker:
SECOND
               
              SAILOR
text: caulked and bitumed ready.

speaker: PERICLES
text: I thank thee, mariner. Say, what coast is this?

speaker:
SECOND
               
              SAILOR
text: We are near Tarsus.

speaker: PERICLES
text: Thither, gentle mariner.

speaker: PERICLES
text: Alter thy course for Tyre. When canst thou reach it?

speaker:
SECOND
               
              SAILOR
text: By break of day if the wind cease.

speaker: PERICLES
text: O, make for Tarsus!

speaker: PERICLES
text: There will I visit Cleon, for the babe

speaker: PERICLES
text: Cannot hold out to Tyrus. There I’ll leave it

speaker: PERICLES
text: At careful nursing. Go thy ways, good mariner.

speaker: PERICLES
text: I’ll bring the body presently.
